title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 06 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 06 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 06 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/05/2025
On the first day after the holiday, DCE iron ore futures prices fluctuated repeatedly, with the most-traded contract I2509 eventually closingat 704.5, unchanged from the pre-holiday level. Traders sold goods according to market conditions, with limited speculative transactions; steel mills purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
